response.global_analysis: Talk segment manually transcribed and translated as it is not present in the reference lyrics. Vocal audio in the song segment phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for 'Airman ga Taosenai'. Timestamps are anchored precisely to vocal onsets. Song pacing is high, so I have applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions, while splitting longer lines to maintain the 50-character limit per block. On-screen song title is transcribed as per Secondary Priority.

subtitles.original: ポストしてください！
subtitles.english: Please post about it!

subtitles.original: 目指せトレンド1位、よろしくだああ！
subtitles.english: Let's aim for trending #1! Here we go!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで。ちょっと、息が整ってないですけど...
subtitles.english: Alright! I'm a bit out of breath, but...

subtitles.original: さて、今年の生誕ライブ、テーマは...
subtitles.english: Well, the theme for this year's birthday live is...

subtitles.original: 「ゲームソングライブ」です！
subtitles.english: "Game Song Live"!

subtitles.original: これまでたくさんやってきた実況配信で、一緒に遊んできた思い出のゲームや...
subtitles.english: From the many game streams we've done together, full of memories...

subtitles.original: こよが大好きをゲーム関連の楽曲をたくさん詰め込みました。
subtitles.english: ...I've packed in lots of game-related songs that I love.

subtitles.original: 最後まで全力で楽しんでってね！
subtitles.english: Enjoy it with all your might until the very end!

subtitles.original: ということで、1曲目は大好きなポケモンの...
subtitles.english: So, for the first song, I sang my favorite Pokemon's...

subtitles.original: 「XYZ」を歌わせていただきました！ねー！
subtitles.english: "XYZ"! Right?!

subtitles.original: 助手くん、わー！
subtitles.english: Joshu-kun, wah!

subtitles.original: 「俺はこいつと旅に出る」っていうことです。
subtitles.english: It means "I'm going on a journey with this guy."

subtitles.original: はい、Xでセトリ予想もね、みんなにたくさんしてもらってたんですけど...
subtitles.english: I saw all your setlist predictions on X, but...

subtitles.original: ポケモンの予想は結構多かったけど、XYZ当てられてる人は結構少なかったです。
subtitles.english: There were many Pokemon guesses, but very few people got "XYZ" right.

subtitles.original: 当たった君、おめでとう！
subtitles.english: To those who got it, congratulations!

subtitles.original: まぁこの曲は、Z-Aが発表になったっていうのもあるんですけど...
subtitles.english: Well, this song... partly because Pokemon Z-A was announced...

subtitles.original: 歌詞がめっちゃ良くて、実はこよりにもぴったりな曲なので選びました。
subtitles.english: But the lyrics are so good, and it's actually perfect for Koyori, so I chose it.

subtitles.original: さぁ、この後も、自分の予想が当たってるかなーって、ドキドキしながら楽しんでいってください。
subtitles.english: Now, please keep enjoying and see if your predictions come true!

subtitles.original: 新3Dお披露目もあるからね！
subtitles.english: There's also a new 3D reveal!

subtitles.original: 絶対に最後まで見てってね！
subtitles.english: Make sure to watch until the very end!

subtitles.original: それでは、そろそろ次の曲。
subtitles.english: Now, time for the next song.

subtitles.original: ゲームの世界へ、どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Off to the game world we go!

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せない
subtitles.english: I Can't Defeat Airman

subtitles.original: 気がついたら　同じ面ばかりプレイ
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, I was playing the same stage again and again

subtitles.original: そしていつも　同じ場所で死ぬ
subtitles.english: And I always die in the same spot

subtitles.original: あきらめずに
subtitles.english: Without giving up,

subtitles.original: 消える足場に挑戦するけど
subtitles.english: I'll keep jumping on the vanishing platforms,

subtitles.original: すぐに下に落ちるよ
subtitles.english: But I immediately fall down

subtitles.original: アイテム2号があれば 楽に 向こうの 岸まで 着くけれど
subtitles.english: If only I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other side...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Airman!

subtitles.original: あの竜巻 何回やっても 避けれない
subtitles.english: I can't dodge those tornadoes, no matter how many times I try

subtitles.original: 後ろに回って 打ち続けても
subtitles.english: Even if I get behind him and keep firing,

subtitles.original: いずれは風に飛ばされる
subtitles.english: I'll eventually be blown away by the wind

subtitles.original: タイム連打も 試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I even tried rapid-pausing,

subtitles.original: 竜巻相手じゃ 意味がない
subtitles.english: but it's useless against the tornado

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対 勝つために
subtitles.english: So, to ensure a win next time,

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは 最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save my E-Tanks until the very end!

subtitles.original: 気がついたら ライフも 少ししかない
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, I had very little life left

subtitles.original: そしていつも そこでE缶使う
subtitles.english: And I always end up using an E-Tank there

subtitles.original: あきらめずに エアーマンまで たどり着くけれど
subtitles.english: I don't give up and manage to reach Airman...

subtitles.original: すぐに 残機 なくなる
subtitles.english: ...but I immediately run out of lives

subtitles.original: リーフシールドがあれば 楽に エアーマンを 倒せるけど
subtitles.english: If only I had the Leaf Shield, I could easily defeat Airman, but...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: ウッドマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Woodman!

subtitles.original: 落ちるこの葉 何回やっても 避けれない
subtitles.english: I can't dodge those falling leaves, no matter how many times I try

subtitles.original: 後ろに下がって 距離をとっても
subtitles.english: Even if I back away and keep my distance,

subtitles.original: いずれは距離を詰められる
subtitles.english: he eventually closes in

subtitles.original: タイム連打も 試してみたけど
subtitles.english: I even tried rapid-pausing,

subtitles.original: あいつのジャンプは くぐれない
subtitles.english: but I can't slide under his jumps

subtitles.original: だから次は絶対 勝つために
subtitles.english: So, to ensure a win next time,

subtitles.original: 僕はE缶だけは 最後までとっておく
subtitles.english: I'll save my E-Tanks until the very end!

subtitles.original: アイテム2号があれば 楽に 向こうの 岸まで 着くけれど
subtitles.english: If only I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other side...

subtitles.original: 何回やっても 何回やっても
subtitles.english: No matter how many times I try,

subtitles.original: エアーマンが倒せないよ
subtitles.english: I can't defeat Airman!
